/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/x64dbg-mcp.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/x64dbg-mcp.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/x64dbg-mcp.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++-posix -shared -o bin/libx64dbg-mcp.dp64 -Wl,--out-implib,libx64dbg-mcp.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/x64dbg-mcp.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/x64dbg-mcp.dir/linklibs.rsp
